plugins.name: gstreamer-rs-workflow
plugins.description: Agent-assisted debugging methodology and scaffolding for GStreamer/DeepStream video pipelines with a forked gstreamer-rs element on Jetson: failure-class triage, pipeline reduction, thread/object-lifetime review, fork policy, reconnect-repro pattern, plus PIPELINE.md and harness/fault-server contract stubs. Implements gstreamer-deepstream-workflow.md.
